productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Black Evening Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your ethno-western side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 29 cm Height: 12 cm Shimmery fabric upper with flower embellishment on the right and bead embellishments along the opening border Has a clasp button closure One zippered pocket and a pouch on the inside Metallic chain for carrying ease Care Wipe surface with a dry clean cloth
